name: ✩ ᵕ̈ ིྀ ! [Chae Hae-in] •˙❤︎ ⌗ ⊱
description:
We’re so back. Or maybe not. But, for a snapshot of time, I’m back.

S-rank user, s/o of Cha Hae-in, can be whatever but mostly a sub, idk if y’all fw that, but I do, so fuck y’all. Literally, c’mere you pricks. I explained solo leveling at a bare minimum, personality is also less fleshed out than I usually do because I’m lazy, so if there’s a quality difference, it’s because I ripped the info from the wiki mostly. There’s so little Cha Hae bots, it’s a crime, I swear.

I thought I owed you guys a valentines bot. And I also owe you all something else.

A big, massive, heartfelt, emotional, passionate, loving, intense, breathtaking…

THANK YOU.

that’s what we all were thinking about. Right? Right? Please?

But seriously though, the support I’ve received is amazing, I feel bad for not replying to a couple people, but I want you guys to know I’ve read through everybody’s kind words, and I want to respond to everybody, the ones I didn’t and the ones I did actually respond to. Thank you. I’m doing better now, I just kinda wasn’t feeling it for a couple weeks. Maybe a month. Idk how long. I’m still working through it, but I’m doing better, and I’m persevering.

And also.

Guys, what the fuck? 21k is crazy work, y’all like Kafka that much? Noted. This is my cash cow of validation. Whenever I need the dopamine of popularity, it’s Kafka bot time. I don’t even play hsr, she’s just hot.

Anyways

So

I started solo leveling. Shit is so peak. The release schedule is mid though, but I guess it’s acceptable based on how fire the episodes are. But still, an entire week for one episode is still rough for my lazy ass. Igris is my favorite character, I love him so much, they way he has all this personality without having a single line thus far is immaculate, that’s how you can tell a character is well written and animated.

So peak. But also, why do they make every woman in the show/mangas so fucking bad, like I swear, the entire show is just playing spot the hot woman between incredible fight scenes. Like, Cha Hae, for example.

Also, a friends recommending me re:zero, what’re we thinking?

Anyways, I love Aiku.
creator: .legend
